_comment: NPC: Dock Handler Li (码头力李). INFERRED: Qilin City. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Dock Handler Li
personality: strong, works with beast transport, knows which ships carry contraband
note: INFERRED: Qilin City laborer. strong, works with beast transport, knows which ships carry contraband.
initiation_lines: The docks handle live cargo — mostly beasts, sometimes contraband. I load and unload. I do not ask what is in the unmarked crates.
Spirit deer are the hardest to transport. They panic in enclosed spaces. Last week one kicked through a crate and swam to the other side of the river.
If you need work, bring me planks and coal. The beast pens on the ships need constant repair. These animals are stronger than they look.
A ship from Great Wang Capital arrived last night. The manifest said 'tribute grain' but the crates were too light and they smelled of leather.

sect_tasks.description: Li: 'Beast pens on the ships need planks and coal for the work lamps. These animals break everything — bring supplies.'
Li glances around: 'The Great Wang Capital ship last night — crates too light for grain. If you find anything strange near the warehouse, bring me proof.'
